since_last: 77% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.26%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 77% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +0.49% · Gold +0.25% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 77% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.26%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.26%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -23.92%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +7.30%, INTC +7.03%, ASML +6.28%, AMAT +6.27%, KLAC +5.98%. Laggards: IBM -23.92%, ISRG -6.07%, ADBE -3.43%, SAP -2.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.37% at $137.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
